name: AWS EventBridge Rule Creation or Updation To Process All Events
description: Detects creation or updation of EventBridge rule pattern to match all events across any AWS service or account which is quite unusual and might indicate an attacker trying to perform reconnaissance on the events, exfiltration to attacker controlled account or lateral movement to other victim AWS accounts.

rules.name: AWS EventBridge Rule Creation or Updation To Process All Events

author: Yash Verma & Christopher Ordonez
